name: Easy Bake Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a 9x13-inch pan with butter.
3. In a heavy saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter and brown sugar until boiling.
4. Stir in 2 cups of chopped pecans into the mixture.
5. Pour the mixture evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
7. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
8. Allow the toffee to cool completely.
9. Break into pieces and store in an air-tight container.
